case_title: ROSELLA BLANDING VS. PROVADA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, ROSELLA AS TO DEFENDANT PROVADA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANDING, ROSELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROVADA, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $19,228.04 PRINCIPAL, $332.17 INTEREST, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,688.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
